source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for dense conservation dashboards with Noto Sans guidance for Japanese labels, tabular numerals, and clear field-science hierarchy.
layout: 8px grid, compact radius, bill-curve tabs, feather dividers, leaf-vein separators, dense analytics panels, and conservation workflow surfaces.

prompts.label: Transparent honeycreeper motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Honeycreeper transparent motif chroma-key source for a design-system catalog
Primary request: Create only an isolated Hawaiian honeycreeper bill motif on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for transparency removal.
Subject: A refined honeycreeper motif combining a slender curved black bill, crimson honeycreeper feather segments, small dark eye-mask contour, and native Hawaiian forest leaf shapes; accurate feather texture, crisp silhouette edges, premium conservation dashboard system feel.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full curved bill silhouette and feather/leaf motif without cropping; no environment, no props, no text.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light preserving crimson feather, matte black bill, deep forest leaf green, and precise natural detail.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 only. One uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Constraints: do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject; no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no landscape, no extra birds, no flowers, no watermark, no text, no random brand names.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 3840x2160 16:9 comprehensive light-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Primary request: Create one wide 16:9 light-mode product design-system board for "Morphous Honeycreeper" / "Honeycreeper" using the motif of a Hawaiian honeycreeper curved black bill, crimson feather, and deep forest leaf.
Visual identity: conservation dashboard system for Hawaiian forest monitoring; crimson feather primary actions, matte black bill ink, deep native leaf green, fern mist surfaces, warm koa bark neutrals, volcanic charcoal text, pale canopy light background, ivory cards, amber nectar focus states, precise field-science product polish.
Required board sections with large readable labels: palette tokens, typography with English and Japanese guidance, component library, navigation/sidebar, conservation dashboard analytics with charts, species status table, forms and filters, status badges and alerts, command/search, tabs, switches, checkboxes, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, texture and icon guidance.
UI language: 8px grid, rounded rectangles radius 8px or less, bill-curve pill tabs, feather-bar dividers, leaf-vein separators, ivory cards, crimson active states, forest green secondary controls, dashboard/table/form/status/navigation sections clearly visible.
Text constraints: use clean readable labels only, no random brand names, no watermark, no lorem ipsum, no misspellings; labels should be generic conservation UI terms such as Overview, Habitat Index, Species, Threat, Status, Survey, Table, Active, Watch, Recovery.
Palette names visible: Feather Crimson #c91f24, Bill Black #171717, Leaf Canopy #2f5d35, Fern Mist #e7efe3, Koa Bark #8a5c36, Nectar Amber #d89a28, Volcanic Charcoal #252321, Canopy Light #f8f5ec, Moss Shadow #596844.
Constraints: no bird photo background, no extra animals, no generic purple/blue gradient kit, no neon palette, no stock brand logos, no random brand names, no watermark.
